tool_lifecycle_note: TRANSITIONAL WILDCARD EXPOSURE (2026-07-14): permitted_tools ["*"] grants in this registry are a documented transitional state per contracts/project-tool-lifecycle.json (wildcard_policy.transitional_exception). Named-tool profiles and PostgreSQL-backed runtime leases arrive with memory-platform Milestone M6 (docs/memory-platform/MEMORY_PLATFORM_EXECUTION_PLAN.md). Do not extend wildcard grants to new servers without review.

builder.purpose: Full AgentCore coding and planning surface for IDE builders.
notes: Primary virtual key: env.BIFROST_MCP_VIRTUAL_KEY

reviewer.purpose: Read-focused review surface; deny debugger attach and admin write tools.
notes: mcp-debugger attach tools denied
Virtual key stub: env.BIFROST_MCP_VK_REVIEWER

database-validator.purpose: Health and status checks against AgentCore memory/database contracts without credential exposure.
notes: Virtual key stub: env.BIFROST_MCP_VK_DATABASE_VALIDATOR

docs-knowledge.purpose: Documentation lookup and durable note retrieval.
notes: Virtual key stub: env.BIFROST_MCP_VK_DOCS_KNOWLEDGE

operator.purpose: Operational gateway administration and project routing.
notes: Virtual key stub: env.BIFROST_MCP_VK_OPERATOR

arabold-docs.purpose: Local/current library and framework documentation replacing Context7.
arabold-docs.rollback_route: Disable arabold_docs in Bifrost mcp.client_configs and restore direct IDE entry only under explicit operator approval.
notes: Vendored package path under ~/.cursor/vendor/arabold-docs-mcp

serena.purpose: Project-scoped semantic code intelligence, symbol navigation, and refactors.
serena.rollback_route: Disable serena wrapper; clear active project; fall back to direct serena.exe only with explicit project cwd.
notes: Launched directly under Bifrost for reliability on Windows.
Project activation remains via agentcore-project-router + Serena tools.
Wrapper scripts under scripts/project_router/wrappers remain available for pooling experiments.

sequential-thinking.purpose: Approved structured planning and multi-step reasoning MCP.
sequential-thinking.rollback_route: Disable sequential_thinking client in Bifrost; do not restore thinking-patterns.
notes: Set DISABLE_THOUGHT_LOGGING=true in Bifrost stdio envs.

cursor-agent-mcp.purpose: Cursor agent bridge for cloud agent orchestration.
cursor-agent-mcp.rollback_route: Disable cursor_agent_mcp; keep CURSOR_API_KEY in Windows User env only.
notes: CURSOR_API_URL fixed to https://api.cursor.com in renderer env map (non-secret).

context-fabric.purpose: Git-backed project continuity, drift checks, and post-commit context capture.
context-fabric.rollback_route: Disable context_fabric wrapper; do not initialize Context Fabric under F:\AgentCore\agentmemory.
notes: Project-scoped only via router; reject Swarm and agentmemory roots.

mcp-debugger.purpose: Runtime debugging session tools for builder surfaces.
mcp-debugger.rollback_route: Disable mcp_debugger; reviewer profile must keep attach tools denied.
notes: Pinned mcp-debugger@0.0.78. Deny attach tools in reviewer profile.

artiforge.purpose: High-leverage architecture scans, project docs, and refactor strategy.
artiforge.rollback_route: Disable artiforge HTTP client; do not embed ARTIFORGE_PAT in Git.
notes: Prefer headers auth if Artiforge exposes a Bearer/header mode.
Current live Artiforge MCP requires query-param PAT composition.
Set Windows User env ARTIFORGE_MCP_URL to the composed URL using ARTIFORGE_PAT locally (never commit).
Bifrost connection_string uses env.ARTIFORGE_MCP_URL only — no secret literals in config.
If upstream returns 401 User is inactive, treat as deferred until ARTIFORGE_PAT is refreshed.

depwire.purpose: Deterministic dependency graph, blast radius, simulate/verify change, architecture health.
depwire.rollback_route: Disable depwire wrapper; connect_repo only against verified local roots.
notes: Direct depwire-cli MCP. connect_repo with verified local path before graph queries.
Telemetry remains enabled; do not set DEPWIRE_NO_TELEMETRY.

depwire-cloud.purpose: Hosted DepWire graph queries for cloud-connected repositories.
depwire-cloud.rollback_route: Keep enabled=false until cloud connectivity is verified; never hardcode DEPWIRE_API_KEY.
notes: enabled=false until verified against api.depwire.dev
Auth via Authorization Bearer from DEPWIRE_API_KEY

tentra.purpose: Project-local knowledge/index MCP with data under AgentRuntime.
tentra.rollback_route: Disable tentra wrapper; data remains at H:\AgentRuntime\tentra\data.
notes: Local mode only. Do not run tentra-mcp init or init --hook.
Data path expected under H:\AgentRuntime\tentra\data via TENTRA_DATA_DIR.

obsidian-vault.purpose: Long-form notes, decisions, runbooks, and durable handoffs.
obsidian-vault.rollback_route: Disable obsidian_vault; leave vault files untouched.
notes: OBSIDIAN_* names only — never embed key values.
Non-secret defaults may set OBSIDIAN_BASE_URL=https://127.0.0.1:27124 and OBSIDIAN_VERIFY_SSL=false in renderer.

playwright.purpose: Bounded local browser automation and UI verification.
playwright.rollback_route: Disable playwright client; leave browser profiles untouched.
notes: Bounded automation only — no Swarm or agentmemory roots.

filesystem.purpose: Project-scoped filesystem MCP limited to registered worktree roots.
filesystem.rollback_route: Disable filesystem wrapper; never restore home-directory-wide filesystem roots in gateway mode.
notes: Bounded to D:\github only (no whole-drive roots).
Further narrowing via project router wrappers remains optional.

github-mcp.purpose: GitHub repository, issue, PR, and remote workflow access.
github-mcp.rollback_route: Remain enabled=false until healthy verification completes.
notes: Deferred: enabled=false unless healthy.
Do not register into Bifrost client_configs until health gate passes.

agentcore-memory.purpose: Model-aware active context over effectively-unbounded durable local project history; no raw DB/admin tools exposed.
agentcore-memory.rollback_route: Restore scripts/agentcore_memory/server.py from pre-M4 commit and re-render Bifrost config; IDE configs unchanged.
notes: Stable server identity: agentcore-memory
Stable 10-tool surface; bounded active packets and recovery pages never cap or delete durable project history.
retrieve_context supports stable chronological pagination and recovery modes; expand_source resolves exact originals and H:/E: artifacts; build_handoff reconstructs current project state.
Model context profiles are governed by contracts/model-context-profiles.json; 4096 is legacy/acceptance-only and one million is not a durable-memory cap.
PostgreSQL reachability remains implemented internally and is reported through memory_status, not exposed as a separate normal-agent tool.
Uses PostgreSQL 18 agent_core on 127.0.0.1:55433 internally via Windows env var credentials; IDE agents receive no DB credentials.
Hybrid retrieval uses PostgreSQL metadata filters, full-text search, pg_trgm, exact pgvector baseline, and Cognee-curated rows only through KnowledgeMemoryPort.
Reports Cognee availability/degradation truthfully and LangGraph as not_integrated_until_M6.

openrouter.purpose: Live model discovery, context-window verification, provider availability, pricing, benchmark comparisons, routing research, OpenRouter documentation, and operator-scoped account functions. Not an LLM provider route for normal IDE inference — does not change any IDE default model or provider.

openrouter-discovery-read.description: Read-only model catalog, benchmarks, docs, and metadata. Short task-scoped JIT lease.

openrouter-account.description: Account-sensitive reads and feedback write. Requires operator scope and approval.

openrouter-billable.description: Billable inference calls. Requires operator approval, declared cost ceiling, invocation bound, expiry, and per-action confirmation. Never include repository source, secrets, or private content.

openrouter.rollback_route: Set enabled=false; confirm no direct per-IDE entries; re-render Bifrost config; restart via \AgentCore\AgentCore-Bifrost-Gateway. OAuth token revocable at openrouter.ai/keys.
notes: LIFECYCLE: installed_dormant -> ready_auth_on_first_use -> authenticated_dormant (OAuth connected) -> jit_leased. Registry status remains 'dormant' by validator contract because tools require a live M6 lease.

COMPLETION STRING (2026-07-20): OPENROUTER MCP AVAILABLE THROUGH AGENTCORE-GATEWAY — OAuth authorized, client connected, discovery lease proofs passed. See audits/OPENROUTER_MCP_OAUTH_BIND_2026-07-20.md.
ENCRYPTION: BIFROST_ENCRYPTION_KEY required in Windows User scope; OAuth token stored encrypted in data/config.db.

OAUTH BINDING: Runtime state H:\AgentRuntime\bifrost\state\oauth-clients.json holds oauth_config_id + mcp_client_id only. After enrollment, runtime config.json must use oauth_config_id (not oauth_config) or restart unbinds the client.

RENDERER BEHAVIOR: Pre-enrollment git/sanitized renderers embed oauth_config public params. Post-enrollment runtime render substitutes oauth_config_id from state file. Do not commit runtime oauth_config_id into Git renderers (OR-10).
ZERO TOOLS exposed without a live M6 capability lease + manual VK mcp_configs grant (JIT bridge still DEFERRED). capability_profiles: [operator] is JIT-eligible reference only.
openrouter must NOT appear in capability_profiles[*].allowed_server_ids — enforced by validator.
JIT governance: M6 PostgreSQL capability_leases. Manual VK update must include existing mcp_configs[].id fields or Bifrost returns 409.
Billable tools (send-message, generate-image) in denied_tools. Never auto-grant on discovery leases.
config.db MUST be treated as secret-bearing. Backups to E:/G: secure paths only.
Official endpoint: https://mcp.openrouter.ai/mcp. Transport: Streamable HTTP (MCP 2025-03-26 spec).

AUTHENTICATED LIVE INVENTORY 2026-07-20: 20 tools; hash 83d1a8d3b4e259ebec5fb511a02fdc664670516bceb2b45da010871ad3ada52e. Live-only extras vs permitted_tools: generate-speech, get-preset, list-presets, transcribe-audio (not yet classified into permitted_tools). denied_tools send-message/generate-image present in live discovery but must stay ungated.
OpenRouter MCP != OpenRouter LLM provider. Does not affect any IDE model or provider configuration.
No OPENROUTER_MCP_KEY in Windows env — OAuth token managed by Bifrost config.db only.
oauth_config_id is runtime-only metadata in H:\AgentRuntime\bifrost\state\oauth-clients.json. Never committed to Git, source renderers, IDE configs, or logs.

agentcore-project-router.purpose: Activate and clear registered project worktrees for project-scoped upstream MCP servers.
notes: State file: H:\AgentRuntime\bifrost\state\active-project.json
Allowed roots scanned from D:\github git repos with Swarm path rejection.
